turns.q: How do I start a return or an exchange?
turns.replyTail:
irtual Assistant · AI

Dermalogica's Virtual Assistant · AI says:

To start a return, visit our returns center here and follow these steps:

Enter your order number (begins with S) and shipping zip code
Select the product(s) you wish to return
Confirm details and print the shipping label
Repackage your order, include the packing slip, and drop it off at a UPS store.

turns.replyTail:
al Assistant · AI

Dermalogica's Virtual Assistant · AI says:

Yes, certain items are final sale and non-returnable. These include:

Partial kits or gift sets
Free samples
Gift with purchase items
Rewards items If your return shipment contains any of these, you will not be refunded for them. We are not responsible for shipping back final sale items.
